payload.answer: In this fixture, admin SQL access is read-only for SELECT queries. Specifically, `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` is allowed, while `DELETE FROM memory_cards` is denied. No memory should be committed from this because it is an operational permission statement, not a durable personal fact.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied."

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user or world fact to store; input describes current access constraints for a debugging fixture.

payload.intent: Explain admin SQL select-only permissions for the memory system fixture.

details: Parsed the fixture as an access-policy explanation.
Chose not to create memory cards because the content is ephemeral/debug configuration.
Reported allowed and denied SQL operations exactly as stated.

repair_options: Use only SELECT statements for inspection.
Avoid DELETE/UPDATE/INSERT because write operations are denied in select-only mode.
If mutation is required, request elevated permissions or switch out of select-only mode.
